# nullcloud Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "nullcloud" {
  url   = "http://localhost:8080"
  token = "mytoken"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `token` (String, Sensitive) Authorization token
- `url` (String) NullCloud backend URL, e.g. http://localhost:8080
